title: IOI-Craft
description: Mods for minecraft, based on technology. The build is created for playing on the IOI-Craft server, but also suitable for solo survival.
body:
This build is designed to play on the server IOI-Craft. But it is also suitable for single survival or playing with friends on a local server. The build is updated and finalized. We take into account players with weak PC, so we try to optimize it as much as possible. 

The assembly itself is based on technological mods such as: Create, Mekanism and so on. There are also mods to change the generation of the world that would explore the world was even more interesting. 

The collection is suitable for fans of adventure, and for fans of technology.

IOI-Craft is under development. We are not sure that it will work stably on your PC. Before installing, make sure that your PC has the minimum requirements for these mods. 

IS NOT AN OFFICIAL [PRODUCT/SERVICE/EVENT, etc.] OF MINECRAFT. NOT ENDORSED BY OR AFFILIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
